reason: ClawChives is self-hosted, not public. Security hardening only when explicitly requested.
off_switch: Once per release cycle (not per session)

reason: Code works. Refactoring is future work, not blocking release.
Critical only: npm audit for actual vulnerabilities, not outdated versions
trigger: Automatic on release, or user requests /npm-audit

reason: HardShell suite covers unit, integration, error paths, and security — required before commit
phases: Phase 2: Integration tests (routes, auth flows, database transactions)
Phase 3: Error path tests (malformed input, constraint violations)
Phase 4: Security tests (auth bypass, CORS, permissions)

reason: Only run before deployment, not after every change
checklist: CF Tunnel setup verified if public deployment

reason: Only when deploying via Cloudflare Tunnel
trigger: When user deploys public via CF Tunnel
checklist: cloudflared tunnel running or systemd service active
DNS CNAME configured in Cloudflare dashboard
